headline: Recurring Subscription Revenues & Buyouts Aid Verisk Amid High Debt
summary: VRSK gains from its subscription model and premium growth, but high debt, security risks and rising costs may cloud its steady expansion outlook.

headline: Cvent Named a Leader for Third Consecutive Year in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Event Marketing and Management Platforms
summary: TYSONS, Va., April 02, 2026--Cvent ranked #1 in all three Use Cases in the 2026 Gartner® Critical Capabilities™ for Event Marketing and Management Platforms companion report

headline: Saviynt Named a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Identity Governance and Administration
summary: Five consecutive times of a Customers’ Choice recognition, reflecting customer reviews and platform adoptionLOS ANGELES, April 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Saviynt, a leading provider of AI-powered identity and governance solutions, today announced it has been named a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Identity Governance and Administration, marking the fifth consecutive time Saviynt has been recognized with this distinction. The distinction is based on verified customer feedback
